title: Recreate Sports Jersey Font from Reference Image (Vector SVG / EPS)
brief: Vectorize and recreate a sports jersey font from a reference image, including both letters (A-Z) and numbers (0-9). The task requires precision and attention to detail to ensure the font is accurately represented in a vector format. The ideal candidate will have experience in graphic design and typography, particularly with vector graphics. Deliverables: Numbers 0–9 Uppercase letters A–Z Matching style and proportions from the reference image Clean vector artwork SVG + EPS + AI files (each for number and letter) Optional: OTF/TTF font file (bonus) Intended use: Football/Soccer jersey printing DTF/Flex/Flock production Requirements: Vector paths must be clean Consistent stroke widths and spacing Commercial usage rights transferred to me The final deliverables must be original vector artwork and not derived from proprietary font files.
